name: Text To Columns
description: Use Text To Columns to take the text in one column and split the string value into separate, multiple columns (or rows), based on a single or multiple delimiters.

fields.name: columnsToSplit
fields.title: Columns to split
fields.description: Select one or more text columns whose values you want to break into parts. Each selected column will be split independently.

fields.name: delimiters
fields.title: Delimiters
fields.description: Characters used to split the text. Each character works as a separator (e.g., ',', '|', or '\\t' for tab). Use multiple characters to split by any of them.

fields.name: splitMethod
fields.title: Split to
fields.description: Choose how to output the split values: create multiple new columns, or generate multiple rows per value.

fields.name: numColumns
fields.title: Number of columns
fields.description: Specify how many new columns should be created when splitting. Extra or missing pieces are handled based on the selected extra-character rule.

fields.name: extraCharacters
fields.title: Extra characters
fields.description: Controls what happens when the input contains more pieces than the number of output columns. Choose whether to keep, drop, or error on extra values.

fields.name: outputRootName
fields.title: Output root name
fields.description: Base name for generating new columns (e.g., 'part' To part_1, part_2…). Leave empty to auto-generate names.

fields.name: advancedOptions
fields.title: Advanced Options
fields.description:
Choose additional rules to control how splitting behaves in complex text. These options prevent unwanted splits when delimiters appear inside quotes, brackets, or parentheses, and help clean up empty values.

• Ignore Delimiters in Quotes - Delimiters inside "double quotes" are ignored.
• Ignore Delimiters in Single Quotes - Same behavior for 'single quotes'.
• Ignore Delimiters in Parentheses - Text like (A,B,C) stays together.
• Ignore Delimiters in Brackets - Useful for codes such as [NY,USA].
• Skip Empty Columns - Removes empty pieces created by consecutive delimiters (e.g., A,,C To A | C).

fields.name: outputColNames
fields.title: Column Names of the Table
fields.description: Output Columns Names of the Table

fields.name: outputColTypes
fields.title: Column Types of the Table
fields.description: Output Column Types of the Table
